files.content:
[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[project]
name = "foundercrisishub"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Crisis management platform for startup founders"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
dependencies = [
    "fastapi>=0.115",
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.32",
    "pydantic>=2.9",
    "pydantic-settings>=2.5",
    "httpx>=0.27",
    "aiosqlite>=0.20",
    "loguru>=0.7"
]
[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = ["pytest>=8", "pytest-asyncio>=0.24", "httpx"]
[tool.hatch.build]
include = ["src/**"]
[tool.hatch.metadata]
packages = [{include = "src/foundercrisishub"}]

FROM python:3.11-slim AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY pyproject.toml .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir hatchling && hatch build

FROM python:3.11-slim AS runtime
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/dist/*.whl .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir *.whl uv
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ["uvicorn", "foundercrisishub.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

.PHONY: install dev run test smoke docker
install:
	uv sync --frozen

dev:
	uv sync

test:
	pytest -q

run:
	uvicorn foundercrisishub.main:app --reload

smoke:
	python -m httpx http://localhost:8000/api/health

docker:
	docker build -t foundercrisishub .

# FounderCrisisHub

## Problem
Startup founders often face crises without immediate support. They need a platform to share, get advice, and coordinate resources quickly.

## Architecture
Layered FastAPI service with async SQLite, health checks, and modular API design.

## Solution
We provide a lightweight web service where founders can post crisis tickets, comment, and receive guidance.

## Features
- Create crisis tickets
- List recent crises
- View ticket details
- Add comments / updates
- Analytics on response times
- Health endpoint for monitoring

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11
- FastAPI
- SQLite (aiosqlite)
- Pydantic v2
- Uvicorn
- Loguru
- HTTPX for testing

## Quick Start
```bash
uv sync --frozen
uvicorn foundercrisishub.main:app --reload
```

## API Endpoints
| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/crises | Create a new crisis ticket |
| GET | /api/crises | List all crises |
| GET | /api/crises/{id} | Get details of a crisis |
| POST | /api/crises/{id}/comment | Add a comment |
| GET | /api/analytics | Get response time stats |
| GET | /api/health | Health check |

## Roadmap
- Phase 1: MVP with core CRUD (completed)
- Phase 2: Real-time notifications via WebSocket
- Phase 3: Admin dashboard and analytics

## License
MIT

from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from foundercrisishub.api import health, crises
from foundercrisishub.core.db import init_db, get_db
from loguru import logger

app = FastAPI(title="FounderCrisisHub", version="0.1.0")
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

@app.on_event("startup")
async def startup():
    await init_db()
    logger.info("Database initialized")

app.state.requests_served = 0

@app.middleware("http")
async def count_requests(request, call_next):
    response = await call_next(request)
    app.state.requests_served += 1
    return response

app.include_router(health.router, prefix="/api")
app.include_router(crises.router, prefix="/api")

from fastapi import APIRouter
from foundercrisishub.core.db import get_db
import time

router = APIRouter()

@router.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    db_status = "up"
    try:
        async with get_db() as conn:
            await conn.execute("SELECT 1")
    except Exception:
        db_status = "down"
    uptime = int(time.time() - time.monotonic())
    return {"status": "ok", "db": db_status, "uptime_seconds": uptime, "requests_served": getattr(router.app.state, "requests_served", 0)}

import aiosqlite
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from foundercrisishub.core.config import get_settings

DATABASE_URL = get_settings().database_url

@asynccontextmanager
async def get_db():
    async with aiosqlite.connect(DATABASE_URL) as db:
        db.row_factory = aiosqlite.Row
        yield db

async def init_db():
    async with get_db() as db:
        await db.execute("""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crises (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            title TEXT NOT NULL,
            description TEXT,
            created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        );
        """)
        await db.execute("""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS comments (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            crisis_id INTEGER,
            comment TEXT,
            created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            FOREIGN KEY(crisis_id) REFERENCES crises(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
        );
        """)
        await db.commit()

from pydantic import BaseModel
from datetime import datetime

class CrisisCreate(BaseModel):
    title: str
    description: str | None = None

class CrisisRead(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    description: str | None = None
    created_at: datetime

class CrisisList(BaseModel):
    items: list[CrisisRead]

from foundercrisishub.schemas.crisis import CrisisCreate, CrisisRead, CrisisList
from foundercrisishub.core.db import get_db

class CrisisService:
    async def create_crisis(self, data: CrisisCreate) -> CrisisRead:
        async with get_db() as db:
            cursor = await db.execute("INSERT INTO crises (title, description) VALUES (?, ?)", (data.title, data.description))
            await db.commit()
            crisis_id = cursor.lastrowid
            return await self.get_crisis(crisis_id)

    async def list_crises(self) -> CrisisList:
        async with get_db() as db:
            rows = await db.execute_fetchall("SELECT * FROM crises")
            items = [CrisisRead(**dict(row)) for row in rows]
            return CrisisList(items=items)

    async def get_crisis(self, crisis_id: int) -> CrisisRead | None:
        async with get_db() as db:
            row = await db.execute_fetchone("SELECT * FROM crises WHERE id = ?", (crisis_id,))
            if row:
                return CrisisRead(**dict(row))
            return None

    async def add_comment(self, crisis_id: int, comment: str) -> None:
        async with get_db() as db:
            await db.execute("INSERT INTO comments (crisis_id, comment) VALUES (?, ?)", (crisis_id, comment))
            await db.commit()

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from foundercrisishub.main import app

client = TestClient(app)

def test_health():
    r = client.get("/api/health")
    assert r.status_code == 200
    data = r.json()
    assert data["status"] == "ok"

import httpx, asyncio

async def main():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        r = await client.get("http://localhost:8000/api/health")
        assert r.status_code == 200
        print("Smoke test passed")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())
